title: Experiment: Dashboard Recommended Actions Effect on PM Decision Rate
background: Product Health Dashboard planned with top-5 recommended actions. Hypothesis: this increases PM proactive decision rate by 40% vs dashboard without recommendations.

control.name: Control
control.description: Dashboard without recommended actions panel. PM views metrics, alerts, and status but must determine next actions independently.

treatments.name: Recommended Actions
treatments.description: Dashboard with top-5 AI-recommended actions panel prominently placed. Each action includes: what to do, why, link to affected artifact.

decision_criteria.ship_if: Primary metric shows >=20% increase with p<0.05 AND no guardrail metrics violated
decision_criteria.hold_if: Primary metric shows 10-20% increase or p between 0.05-0.10 — need more data
decision_criteria.abandon_if: Primary metric shows <10% increase OR p>0.10 after 28 days

guardrail_metrics.action_if_violated: Pause experiment. Fix performance before continuing.
